supporting_quote: FGFR4 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of FGFR4, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis pattern. Quantitative real-time PCR with primer-probe set RTS3232 (also RTS1325). Generic methods boilerplate offers cyclophilin A as an alternative normalizer, but the per-experiment in-vitro screening text explicitly uses total RNA via RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: CD40 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content as measured by normalization to RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of CD40, relative to untreated control cells
notes: Ionis pattern. Quantitative real-time PCR. Generic methods boilerplate lists GAPDH (housekeeping) as an alternative, but the actual in-vitro assay text normalizes to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Treatment 150 nM ASO, ~24h.

supporting_quote: ATXN3 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent reduction of the amount of ATXN3 mRNA, relative to untreated control cells
notes: Ionis pattern. Real-time PCR with primer-probe set RTS4392. Newer patent (2019) but same total-RNA/RIBOGREEN normalization. No housekeeping gene used for the screening tables.

supporting_quote: C9ORF72 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of C9ORF72, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis pattern. Quantitative real-time PCR with primer-probe sets RTS3750/RTS3905/RTS4097. Generic methods boilerplate offers cyclophilin A as alternative; in-vitro assay uses total RNA via RIBOGREEN.

supporting_quote: Factor 7 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content as measured by RIBOGREEN®. Results are presented as percent inhibition of Factor 7, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis pattern. Real-time RT-PCR; HepB3 (Hep3B) cells, 50 nM ASO via lipofectin, ~24h. Generic methods boilerplate lists cyclophilin A and GAPDH as alternatives, but in-vitro assay normalizes to total RNA via RIBOGREEN.
